title: Sources of law
doc_html:
PRELIMINARY TITLE

CHAPTER 1 - GENERAL PRINCIPLES

Art. 1.  Sources of law

The sources of law are legislation and custom.

Acts 1987, No. 124, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1988.
